identity.name: Jesadakorn Kirtnu
identity.headline: Hybrid IT Manager & AI Systems Architect

summary: Hybrid IT Manager and AI Systems Architect combining enterprise infrastructure automation, local-first agentic AI, and full-stack software delivery. Leads dependable macOS operations across Thailand and Germany while designing private workflow systems that keep consequential decisions in human hands.
leadership: Cross-border operations across Thailand and Germany

bullets: Automate and manage 50+ macOS workstations with Ansible, Munki, and custom packages, maintaining stable daily operations with minimal manual oversight.
Coordinate IT operations between Thailand and Germany, including secure Tailscale networking, rapid onboarding, Obsidian-based knowledge systems, and workplace compliance.
Designed Folio ERP around 84+ workflow states, seven organizational roles, granular RBAC, and Claim Task concurrency protection for distributed accounting teams.
Built local AI and RAG workflows for financial extraction, policy cross-reference, GL recommendations, account matching, 7% VAT validation, and human veto control.
Delivered ERP and cloud infrastructure solutions spanning role-based approvals, backend services, user-facing interfaces, and business workflow integration.
Led mining operations across budgets, hardware, thermal design, power distribution, maintenance, and software-level kernel optimization.
Built POS, inventory, administration, and workflow-based web applications for business clients.

selectedSystems: Folio ERP: 84+ states | 7 roles | concurrency-safe approvals
HR AI Agent: LINE | n8n | private local LLM processing
AI Contract Analyzer: private RAG | policy cross-reference | risk flags

education.institution: Prince of Songkla University, Phuket Campus
